summary: Comprehensive testing of 3 new features completed: Gender field validation (Mens/Womens/Kids only), Turnaround time reports API, and Delayed lots detection API. All backend tests pass (100%). Frontend UI testing confirms Gender dropdown shows correct 3 options and Reports page displays Average Turnaround Times section with all 5 metrics.

issues: Recharts console warnings about chart dimensions being -1, but charts render correctly

passed_tests: Backend API: Gender 'Mens' accepted and lot created successfully
Backend API: Gender 'Womens' accepted and lot created successfully
Backend API: Gender 'Kids' accepted and lot created successfully
Backend API: Gender 'Unisex' rejected with 422 validation error
Backend API: Gender 'Male' rejected with 422 validation error (not same as 'Mens')
Backend API: Gender 'Female' rejected with 422 validation error (not same as 'Womens')
Backend API: Empty gender string accepted (backward compatibility for imported data)
Backend API: GET /reports/turnaround returns 200 status
Backend API: Turnaround response has all 5 metrics (cutting_to_stitching, stitching_to_bartack, bartack_to_washing, washing_to_complete, total_turnaround)
Backend API: Each turnaround metric contains average_days and sample_size fields
Backend API: Turnaround values are numeric and non-negative
Backend API: GET /reports/delayed returns 200 status
Backend API: GET /reports/delayed?days_threshold=7 accepts parameter
Backend API: Delayed response has threshold_days, total_delayed, delayed_lots fields
Backend API: Default days_threshold is 7 when not specified
Backend API: GET /reports/summary endpoint still works correctly
Frontend: Gender dropdown shows only 3 options (Mens, Womens, Kids)
Frontend: Gender dropdown on /cutting/new page loads correctly
Frontend: Reports page shows 'Average Turnaround Times' section with clock icon
Frontend: Cutting → Stitching metric displayed (15 days, n=1)
Frontend: Stitching → Bartack metric displayed (0 days, n=0)
Frontend: Bartack → Washing metric displayed (0 days, n=1)
Frontend: Washing → Complete metric displayed (0.7 days, n=3)
Frontend: Total Turnaround metric displayed (272.7 days, n=3)
critical_code_review_comments: Gender validation using Pydantic @validator decorator works correctly - validates non-empty strings against ['Mens', 'Womens', 'Kids']
Empty string gender is allowed (validator checks 'if v and v not in valid_genders') - intentional for backward compatibility with Excel imports
Turnaround API calculates average_days correctly by parsing ISO dates from each stage
Delayed lots API correctly identifies lots stuck in stage by comparing stage start dates against threshold
Frontend Reports.jsx properly displays turnaround data with sample sizes in parentheses
seed_data_creation: Test lots created during testing were cleaned up successfully
context_for_next_testing_agent: Three new features tested and working: 1) Gender field now restricted to Mens/Womens/Kids via Pydantic validator in server.py (empty string allowed for backward compat), 2) GET /api/reports/turnaround returns avg days between 5 stage transitions with sample sizes, 3) GET /api/reports/delayed?days_threshold=7 returns lots stuck in stage. Currently 0 delayed lots since all recent lots processed within 7 days. Reports page displays turnaround metrics in a grid with colored backgrounds (blue/purple/amber/cyan/green) and shows sample size in parentheses.
